title: Connectra contact/company task pack — doc index
summary: The authoritative **Connectra contact + company** analysis lives next to the sync server (imported analysis). Use it when planning **`3.0`–`3.6`** work and when reconciling GraphQL ↔ Connectra ↔ ES/PG.
